input: PROJ-123 is broken, users can't login
rationale: Jira ticket reference + reported breakage = debug scenario

input: I want to build a notification system
rationale: Ideation phrase 'I want to build' triggers brainstorming before implementation
Explicit plan path + 'execute' keyword = plan executor

input: what would other AIs think about this approach?
rationale: Explicit multi-model / other AIs request = council skill
'audit the wiring' is a direct trigger phrase for ftm-audit

input: check the admin console at admin.company.com
rationale: URL + visual check request = browser automation skill

input: scan for secrets before we push
rationale: Pre-push secret scan is a git safety operation

input: help me think through this API design
rationale: 'help me think through' is a brainstorm trigger phrase

input: rename userId to user_id across the codebase
rationale: Simple rename = micro task, handle directly without routing to a sub-skill

input: deploy the latest changes to production
rationale: Deployment needs orientation + confirmation loop before acting — stays in ftm-mind
Freshservice ticket without clear intent — ftm-mind fetches context then re-orients

input: debug this deeply, nothing else has worked
rationale: Explicit 'debug' + escalation signal ('nothing else worked') = deep debug

input: pause this session, I need to go
show me the retro for last sprint
rationale: Retrospective / review request maps to ftm-retro
